body.title: Shim notification filter + tmux delivery
body.result: NotificationDispatcher (filter+deliver, SILENT/QUIET/LOUD, tmux guard, drain_pending); BaseShim._notifier + filter_incoming additive; 13 tests
body.intention: I intend that every incoming bus message is delivered at the level the receiving shim's config specifies — SILENT queues silently, QUIET queues and surfaces at next break, LOUD fires an immediate tmux interrupt — so CC is never interrupted while working and always woken when idle.
body.description:
Wire a NotificationDispatcher into BaseShim that intercepts incoming messages and applies the notification config to decide delivery mode. On message receipt: (1) load NotificationConfig for this device, (2) read current agent state (available flag) to determine effective default (available=idle → QUIET, available=false/working → SILENT), (3) apply per-sender override if present, (4) execute delivery. LOUD: tmux send-keys to own CC_TMUX_SESSION (guard with `tmux has-session` first; fall back to QUIET if no session). QUIET: leave in mailbox, append sender+summary to ~/.unseen_university/<device>/notify_pending.txt for surfacing at next /savestate or /context-load. SILENT: mailbox only. Log every delivery decision at INFO: 'notif: <sender> → <LEVEL> (reason: <state/override/default>)'.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/shim.py (additive: new _notifier attribute, instantiated in __init__), unseen_university/notification_dispatcher.py (new class), tests/test_shim_notif.py (new)
**Design rules:** external-state principle — no in-memory-only fields; log every interface crossing (AR-009)
**Scope boundary:** In scope: NotificationDispatcher class, BaseShim wiring (additive only — no lifecycle method changes), tmux delivery with has-session guard, state-linked defaults, QUIET pending list. Out of scope: /notify skill (T-notify-skill), per-device config creation (T-notif-config-schema).
**HIGH-INERTIA:** shim.py is design-center. Change is ADDITIVE ONLY — new _notifier attribute + instantiation. No existing methods modified. Akien pre-approval required before sprint.
**Completion criteria:** BaseShim has _notifier attribute. Incoming message triggers delivery decision logged at INFO. LOUD falls back to QUIET when tmux session absent (tmux has-session returns false). SILENT leaves message in mailbox with no tmux action. QUIET appends to notify_pending.txt. State-linked default: when available.false file present, default is SILENT regardless of config. 5+ tests covering all delivery paths + fallback.
